	if((subarticulations_ids[i{int} {i} ]{int} {subarticulations_ids}  > 0) or (i{int} {i}  = 0))

on ui_control(mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve{int} {mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve} )
	if(mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve{int} {mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve}  = 0)
		_articulation_volume_min[(selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  * 8) + selected_keyswitch{int} {selected_keyswitch} ]{int} {_articulation_volume_min}  := 5
		_articulation_volume_max[(selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  * 8) + selected_keyswitch{int} {selected_keyswitch} ]{int} {_articulation_volume_max}  := 127
		_articulation_volume_curve[(selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  * 8) + selected_keyswitch{int} {selected_keyswitch} ]{int} {_articulation_volume_curve}  := 40
	else
		if(mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve{int} {mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve}  = 1)
			_articulation_volume_min[(selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  * 8) + selected_keyswitch{int} {selected_keyswitch} ]{int} {_articulation_volume_min}  := 0
			_articulation_volume_max[(selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  * 8) + selected_keyswitch{int} {selected_keyswitch} ]{int} {_articulation_volume_max}  := 127
			_articulation_volume_curve[(selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  * 8) + selected_keyswitch{int} {selected_keyswitch} ]{int} {_articulation_volume_curve}  := 40
		else
			if(mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve{int} {mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve}  = 2)
				_articulation_volume_min[(selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  * 8) + selected_keyswitch{int} {selected_keyswitch} ]{int} {_articulation_volume_min}  := 5
				_articulation_volume_max[(selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  * 8) + selected_keyswitch{int} {selected_keyswitch} ]{int} {_articulation_volume_max}  := 127
				_articulation_volume_curve[(selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  * 8) + selected_keyswitch{int} {selected_keyswitch} ]{int} {_articulation_volume_curve}  := 0
			else
				if(mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve{int} {mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve}  = 3)
					_articulation_volume_min[(selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  * 8) + selected_keyswitch{int} {selected_keyswitch} ]{int} {_articulation_volume_min}  := 0
					_articulation_volume_max[(selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  * 8) + selected_keyswitch{int} {selected_keyswitch} ]{int} {_articulation_volume_max}  := 127
					_articulation_volume_curve[(selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  * 8) + selected_keyswitch{int} {selected_keyswitch} ]{int} {_articulation_volume_curve}  := 0
				else
					if(mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve{int} {mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve}  = 4)
						_articulation_volume_min[(selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  * 8) + selected_keyswitch{int} {selected_keyswitch} ]{int} {_articulation_volume_min}  := 127
						_articulation_volume_max[(selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  * 8) + selected_keyswitch{int} {selected_keyswitch} ]{int} {_articulation_volume_max}  := 127
						_articulation_volume_curve[(selected_instrument{int} {selected_instrument}  * 8) + selected_keyswitch{int} {selected_keyswitch} ]{int} {_articulation_volume_curve}  := 0
					end if
				end if
			end if
		end if
	end if
	call update_keyswitch_volume_curve{UserDefined, Call, update_keyswitch_volume_curve}
end on

function Preset::__decr__

function articulation_update_minimal_delay

			else
				_articulation_minimal_delay[(next_free_idx1{int} {next_free_idx1}  * 8) + idx35{int} {idx35} ]{int} {_articulation_minimal_delay}  := _articulation_minimal_delay[(next_free_idx1{int} {next_free_idx1}  * 8) + idx35{int} {idx35} ]{int} {_articulation_minimal_delay}  - ((_articulation_minimal_delay[(next_free_idx1{int} {next_free_idx1}  * 8) + idx35{int} {idx35} ]{int} {_articulation_minimal_delay}  - subarticulations_start_offset[subarticulations_ids_positions[_loaded_subarticulations[(next_free_idx1{int} {next_free_idx1}  * 32) + ((idx35{int} {idx35}  * 4) + i31{int} {i31} )]{int} {_loaded_subarticulations} ]{int} {subarticulations_ids_positions} ]{int} {subarticulations_start_offset} ) .and. sh_right(_articulation_minimal_delay[(next_free_idx1{int} {next_free_idx1}  * 8) + idx35{int} {idx35} ]{int} {_articulation_minimal_delay}  - subarticulations_start_offset[subarticulations_ids_positions[_loaded_subarticulations[(next_free_idx1{int} {next_free_idx1}  * 32) + ((idx35{int} {idx35}  * 4) + i31{int} {i31} )]{int} {_loaded_subarticulations} ]{int} {subarticulations_ids_positions} ]{int} {subarticulations_start_offset} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})

function update_minimal_delays

			call articulation_update_minimal_delay{UserDefined, Call, articulation_update_minimal_delay}
			inc(_ret280{int} {_ret280} ){Builtin, None, inc}
		end while
		inc(is_free1{int} {is_free1} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
end function

function editor_page_open
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(pnl_editor_page{int} {pnl_editor_page} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int} {HIDE_PART_NOTHING} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	if(nki_type{int} {nki_type}  # 0)
		set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_bg_upper{int} {lbl_bg_upper} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE} , "bg_upper_editor"){Builtin, None, set_control_par_str}

	end if
end function

			articulation_id2{int} {articulation_id2}  := s00{int} {s00} 
			call event_list_contains{UserDefined, Call, event_list_contains}

			if(is_active00{int} {is_active00}  = 0)
				articulation_id0{int} {articulation_id0}  := s00{int} {s00} 
				call delay_buffer_contains{UserDefined, Call, delay_buffer_contains}
				i290{int} {i290}  := ret18{int} {ret18} 
				if(i290{int} {i290}  = 0)
					transition_type0{int} {transition_type0}  := s00{int} {s00} 
					call articulation_event_clear{UserDefined, Call, articulation_event_clear}

					articulation_event_keyswitch[s00{int} {s00} ]{int} {articulation_event_keyswitch}  := -1

		end if
		s00{int} {s00}  := s00{int} {s00}  + 1
	end while

end function

function delay_buffer_add

function update_selected_notes
	ks4{int} {ks4}  := 0
	pressed_key_idx{int} {pressed_key_idx}  := 0
	i{int} {i}  := nki_range[1]{int} {nki_range} 
	while(i{int} {i}  >= nki_range[0]{int} {nki_range} ) 
		if((pressed_keys[i{int} {i} ]{int} {pressed_keys}  > (ENGINE_UPTIME{int} {ENGINE_UPTIME}  - input_acceptance_time{int} {input_acceptance_time} )) or (((NI_CALLBACK_TYPE{int} {NI_CALLBACK_TYPE}  # NI_CB_TYPE_RELEASE{int} {NI_CB_TYPE_RELEASE} ) or (last_note_input_time{int} {last_note_input_time}  > (ENGINE_UPTIME{int} {ENGINE_UPTIME}  - input_acceptance_time{int} {input_acceptance_time} ))) and (pressed_keys[i{int} {i} ]{int} {pressed_keys}  > 0)))
			inst{int} {inst}  := 0
			while(inst{int} {inst}  <= 0) 
				idx18{int} {idx18}  := (num_pressed_keys{int} {num_pressed_keys}  - 1) - pressed_key_idx{int} {pressed_key_idx} 
				num_pressed_notes0{int} {num_pressed_notes0}  := num_pressed_keys{int} {num_pressed_keys} 
				note_selection0{int} {note_selection0}  := note_selections[inst{int} {inst} ]{int} {note_selections} 
				call is_in_note_selection{UserDefined, Call, is_in_note_selection}
				if((is_in_note_selection_boolean{int} {is_in_note_selection_boolean}  = 1) and (_pressed_notes_per_instrument[(inst{int} {inst}  * 128) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_pressed_notes_per_instrument}  = 0))
					_pressed_notes_per_instrument[(inst{int} {inst}  * 128) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_pressed_notes_per_instrument}  := 1
					instrument_slot7{int} {instrument_slot7}  := inst{int} {inst} 
					note18{int} {note18}  := i{int} {i} 
					velocity1{int} {velocity1}  := 1 - ((1 - key_velocity[i{int} {i} ]{int} {key_velocity} ) .and. sh_right(1 - key_velocity[i{int} {i} ]{int} {key_velocity} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})
					timing_offset0{int} {timing_offset0}  := pressed_keys[i{int} {i} ]{int} {pressed_keys}  - ENGINE_UPTIME{int} {ENGINE_UPTIME} 
					call articulations_on_note{UserDefined, Call, articulations_on_note}
					_ret15000{int} {_ret15000}  := _ret1500{int} {_ret1500} 
					_ret28000{int} {_ret28000}  := _ret2800{int} {_ret2800} 
				else
					if((is_in_note_selection_boolean{int} {is_in_note_selection_boolean}  = 0) and (_pressed_notes_per_instrument[(inst{int} {inst}  * 128) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_pressed_notes_per_instrument}  = 1))
						_pressed_notes_per_instrument[(inst{int} {inst}  * 128) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_pressed_notes_per_instrument}  := 0
						instrument_slot6{int} {instrument_slot6}  := inst{int} {inst} 
						note17{int} {note17}  := i{int} {i} 
						call articulations_note_off{UserDefined, Call, articulations_note_off}
					end if
				end if
				inc(inst{int} {inst} ){Builtin, None, inc}
			end while
		end if
		if(pressed_keys[i{int} {i} ]{int} {pressed_keys}  > 0)
			inc(pressed_key_idx{int} {pressed_key_idx} ){Builtin, None, inc}
		end if
		dec(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None, dec}
	end while
	inst{int} {inst}  := 0
	while(inst{int} {inst}  <= 0) 
		active_notes[inst{int} {inst} ]{int} {active_notes}  := 0
		i{int} {i}  := nki_range[0]{int} {nki_range} 
		while(i{int} {i}  <= nki_range[1]{int} {nki_range} ) 
			if(_pressed_notes_per_instrument[(inst{int} {inst}  * 128) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_pressed_notes_per_instrument}  = 1)
				inc(active_notes[inst{int} {inst} ]{int} {active_notes} ){Builtin, None, inc}
			end if
			inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None, inc}
		end while
		inc(inst{int} {inst} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
end function

	end while
end function

end function

end function

function articulations_compute_fade_level
	subarticulation_modulation_strength0{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength0}  := 0
	instrument_slot6{int} {instrument_slot6}  := _loaded_subarticulations_start[(release_offset0{int} {release_offset0}  * 32) + ((i33{int} {i33}  * 4) + ks3{int} {ks3} )]{int} {_loaded_subarticulations_start} 
	i28010{int} {i28010}  := _loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[(release_offset0{int} {release_offset0}  * 32) + ((i33{int} {i33}  * 4) + ks3{int} {ks3} )]{int} {_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in} 
	trigger_clear010{int} {trigger_clear010}  := _loaded_subarticulations_end[(release_offset0{int} {release_offset0}  * 32) + ((i33{int} {i33}  * 4) + ks3{int} {ks3} )]{int} {_loaded_subarticulations_end} 
	i2910{int} {i2910}  := _loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[(release_offset0{int} {release_offset0}  * 32) + ((i33{int} {i33}  * 4) + ks3{int} {ks3} )]{int} {_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out} 
	if(in_range(note17{int} {note17} , instrument_slot6{int} {instrument_slot6} , trigger_clear010{int} {trigger_clear010} ){Builtin, None, in_range})
		subarticulation_modulation_strength0{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength0}  := 1
		if(in_range(note17{int} {note17} , instrument_slot6{int} {instrument_slot6} , instrument_slot6{int} {instrument_slot6}  + i28010{int} {i28010} ){Builtin, None, in_range} and (i28010{int} {i28010}  > 0))
			subarticulation_modulation_strength0{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength0}  := real(note17{int} {note17}  - instrument_slot6{int} {instrument_slot6} ){Builtin, None, real} / real(i28010{int} {i28010} ){Builtin, None, real}
		else
			if(in_range(note17{int} {note17} , trigger_clear010{int} {trigger_clear010}  - i2910{int} {i2910} , trigger_clear010{int} {trigger_clear010} ){Builtin, None, in_range} and (i2910{int} {i2910}  > 0))

function get_next_rr
	is_free100{int} {is_free100}  := 0
	i3100{int} {i3100}  := 0
	if(subarticulations_rrr[subarticulations_ids_positions[_loaded_subarticulations[(trigger_clear0100{int} {trigger_clear0100}  * 32) + ((i29100{int} {i29100}  * 4) + is_active0100{int} {is_active0100} )]{int} {_loaded_subarticulations} ]{int} {subarticulations_ids_positions} ]{int} {subarticulations_rrr}  = 0)
		if(_loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode[(trigger_clear0100{int} {trigger_clear0100}  * 32) + ((i29100{int} {i29100}  * 4) + is_active0100{int} {is_active0100} )]{int} {_loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode}  = 0)
			is_free100{int} {is_free100}  := (_rr_data_idx[(trigger_clear0100{int} {trigger_clear0100}  * 4096) + ((i29100{int} {i29100}  * 512) + ((is_active0100{int} {is_active0100}  * 128) + _ret28000{int} {_ret28000} ))]{int} {_rr_data_idx}  + 1) mod subarticulations_rr_num[subarticulations_ids_positions[_loaded_subarticulations[(trigger_clear0100{int} {trigger_clear0100}  * 32) + ((i29100{int} {i29100}  * 4) + is_active0100{int} {is_active0100} )]{int} {_loaded_subarticulations} ]{int} {subarticulations_ids_positions} ]{int} {subarticulations_rr_num} 
		else
			is_free100{int} {is_free100}  := random(0, subarticulations_rr_num[subarticulations_ids_positions[_loaded_subarticulations[(trigger_clear0100{int} {trigger_clear0100}  * 32) + ((i29100{int} {i29100}  * 4) + is_active0100{int} {is_active0100} )]{int} {_loaded_subarticulations} ]{int} {subarticulations_ids_positions} ]{int} {subarticulations_rr_num}  - 1){Builtin, None, random}
		end if
	else
		if((ENGINE_UPTIME{int} {ENGINE_UPTIME}  - _rr_data_time[(trigger_clear0100{int} {trigger_clear0100}  * 4096) + ((i29100{int} {i29100}  * 512) + ((is_active0100{int} {is_active0100}  * 128) + _ret28000{int} {_ret28000} ))]{int} {_rr_data_time} ) > subarticulations_rrr_reset_time[subarticulations_ids_positions[_loaded_subarticulations[(trigger_clear0100{int} {trigger_clear0100}  * 32) + ((i29100{int} {i29100}  * 4) + is_active0100{int} {is_active0100} )]{int} {_loaded_subarticulations} ]{int} {subarticulations_ids_positions} ]{int} {subarticulations_rrr_reset_time} )
			if(_loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode[(trigger_clear0100{int} {trigger_clear0100}  * 32) + ((i29100{int} {i29100}  * 4) + is_active0100{int} {is_active0100} )]{int} {_loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode}  = 0)
				is_free100{int} {is_free100}  := (_rr_data_idx[(trigger_clear0100{int} {trigger_clear0100}  * 4096) + ((i29100{int} {i29100}  * 512) + ((is_active0100{int} {is_active0100}  * 128) + _ret28000{int} {_ret28000} ))]{int} {_rr_data_idx}  + 1) mod subarticulations_rrr[subarticulations_ids_positions[_loaded_subarticulations[(trigger_clear0100{int} {trigger_clear0100}  * 32) + ((i29100{int} {i29100}  * 4) + is_active0100{int} {is_active0100} )]{int} {_loaded_subarticulations} ]{int} {subarticulations_ids_positions} ]{int} {subarticulations_rrr} 
			else
				is_free100{int} {is_free100}  := random(0, subarticulations_rrr[subarticulations_ids_positions[_loaded_subarticulations[(trigger_clear0100{int} {trigger_clear0100}  * 32) + ((i29100{int} {i29100}  * 4) + is_active0100{int} {is_active0100} )]{int} {_loaded_subarticulations} ]{int} {subarticulations_ids_positions} ]{int} {subarticulations_rrr}  - 1){Builtin, None, random}

			end if
		else
			if(_loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode[(trigger_clear0100{int} {trigger_clear0100}  * 32) + ((i29100{int} {i29100}  * 4) + is_active0100{int} {is_active0100} )]{int} {_loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode}  = 0)

	i280100{int} {i280100}  := is_free100{int} {is_free100} 
end function

function subarticulation_event_get_free_index
	highest1{int} {highest1}  := -1
	lowest00{int} {lowest00}  := 0
	while((lowest00{int} {lowest00}  < 256) and (lowest00{int} {lowest00}  >= 0)) 
		lowest00{int} {lowest00}  := search(subarticulation_event_list{int[]} {subarticulation_event_list} , -1, lowest00{int} {lowest00} , 256){Builtin, None, search}
		if(lowest00{int} {lowest00}  >= 0)
			if(subarticulation_event_last_used[lowest00{int} {lowest00} ]{int} {subarticulation_event_last_used}  < (ENGINE_UPTIME{int} {ENGINE_UPTIME}  - lookahead{int} {lookahead} ))
				highest1{int} {highest1}  := lowest00{int} {lowest00} 
				lowest00{int} {lowest00}  := 256
			end if
			inc(lowest00{int} {lowest00} ){Builtin, None, inc}
		end if
	end while
	highest00{int} {highest00}  := highest1{int} {highest1} 
end function

		redirect_output(event0{int} {event0} , output_type0{int} {output_type0} , instrument2{int} {instrument2} ){Builtin, None, redirect_output}
	end if
end function

function subarticulation_event_fade_out

		if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[subarticulation_event_id16{int} {subarticulation_event_id16} ]{int} {subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id}  - -1){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}){Builtin, None, abs} = 1)

			fade_out(subarticulation_event_transition_event_id[subarticulation_event_id16{int} {subarticulation_event_id16} ]{int} {subarticulation_event_transition_event_id} , fade_time1{int} {fade_time1}  * 1000, stop_voice0{int} {stop_voice0} ){Builtin, None, fade_out}

function repetition_engine_add
	transition0{int} {transition0}  := search(repetition_engine_subarticulation_events{int[]} {repetition_engine_subarticulation_events} , -1){Builtin, None, search}
	if(transition0{int} {transition0}  # -1)
		repetition_engine_subarticulation_events[transition0{int} {transition0} ]{int} {repetition_engine_subarticulation_events}  := layer0{int} {layer0} 
		repetition_engine_active{int} {repetition_engine_active}  := 1
		if(repetition_engine_start_time{int} {repetition_engine_start_time}  = -1)
			repetition_engine_start_time{int} {repetition_engine_start_time}  := ENGINE_UPTIME{int} {ENGINE_UPTIME} 
		end if
		repetition_engine_highest_idx{int} {repetition_engine_highest_idx}  := repetition_engine_highest_idx{int} {repetition_engine_highest_idx}  - ((repetition_engine_highest_idx{int} {repetition_engine_highest_idx}  - transition0{int} {transition0} ) .and. sh_right(repetition_engine_highest_idx{int} {repetition_engine_highest_idx}  - transition0{int} {transition0} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})
	else
		message("REACHED MAX_SUBARTICULATIONS_IN_REPETITION_ENGINE"){Builtin, None, message}
	end if
end function

function last_transitions_update
	i35{int} {i35}  := 0
	while(i35{int} {i35}  <= (num_elements(_last_transitions{int[]} {_last_transitions} ){Builtin, None, num_elements} - 1)) 
		if(_last_transitions[i35{int} {i35} ]{int} {_last_transitions}  # -1)
			if(_last_transitions_timecode[i35{int} {i35} ]{int} {_last_transitions_timecode}  < (ENGINE_UPTIME{int} {ENGINE_UPTIME}  - 2000))
				_last_transitions[i35{int} {i35} ]{int} {_last_transitions}  := -1
			end if
		end if
		inc(i35{int} {i35} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
end function

end function

function repetition_engine_update_tempo
	subarticulation_modulation_strength0{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength0}  := real(ms_to_ticks(60000000){Builtin, None, ms_to_ticks}){Builtin, None, real} / 960
	if((subarticulation_modulation_strength0{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength0}  # tempo{real} {tempo} ) or (NI_CALLBACK_TYPE{int} {NI_CALLBACK_TYPE}  # NI_CB_TYPE_LISTENER{int} {NI_CB_TYPE_LISTENER} ))
		transition0{int} {transition0}  := 0
		layer0{int} {layer0}  := 0
		result6{int} {result6}  := 0
		while(result6{int} {result6}  <= 0) 
			transition0{int} {transition0}  := 0
			while(transition0{int} {transition0}  <= 7) 
				layer0{int} {layer0}  := 0
				while(layer0{int} {layer0}  <= 3) 
					if(_loaded_subarticulations[(result6{int} {result6}  * 32) + ((transition0{int} {transition0}  * 4) + layer0{int} {layer0} )]{int} {_loaded_subarticulations}  >= 0)

function update_solo_selection
	instrument1{int} {instrument1}  := 0
	i280000{int} {i280000}  := 0
	while(i280000{int} {i280000}  <= 4) 
		if(get_control_par(btn_mixer_channel_solo[i280000{int} {i280000} ]{int} {btn_mixer_channel_solo} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None, get_control_par} = 1)
			instrument1{int} {instrument1}  := 1
		end if
		inc(i280000{int} {i280000} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	if(instrument1{int} {instrument1}  = 1)
		i280000{int} {i280000}  := 0
		while(i280000{int} {i280000}  <= 4) 
			set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int} {ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN} , 396851 * get_control_par(btn_mixer_channel_solo[i280000{int} {i280000} ]{int} {btn_mixer_channel_solo} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None, get_control_par}, -1, 5, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} {NI_BUS_OFFSET}  + i280000{int} {i280000} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
			inc(i280000{int} {i280000} ){Builtin, None, inc}
		end while
	else
		i280000{int} {i280000}  := 0
		while(i280000{int} {i280000}  <= 4) 
			set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int} {ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN} , 396851 * abs(sh_right(abs(get_control_par(btn_mixer_channel_mute[i280000{int} {i280000} ]{int} {btn_mixer_channel_mute} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None, get_control_par}){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}){Builtin, None, abs}, -1, 5, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} {NI_BUS_OFFSET}  + i280000{int} {i280000} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
			inc(i280000{int} {i280000} ){Builtin, None, inc}
		end while
	end if
end function

		set_control_par(get_ui_id(pnl_editor_parameters{int} {pnl_editor_parameters} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int} {HIDE_PART_NOTHING} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	else
		set_control_par(get_ui_id(pnl_editor_overview{int} {pnl_editor_overview} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int} {HIDE_PART_NOTHING} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	end if
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_subarticulation_title{int} {btn_subarticulation_title} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} , 0){Builtin, None, set_control_par}

end function

function move_legato_buffer_to_instrument
	subarticulation_idx1{int} {subarticulation_idx1}  := 0
	keyswitch1{int} {keyswitch1}  := 0
	instrument1{int} {instrument1}  := 0
	note1{int} {note1}  := 0
	while(note1{int} {note1}  <= 1) 
		subarticulation_idx1{int} {subarticulation_idx1}  := 0
		while(subarticulation_idx1{int} {subarticulation_idx1}  <= 127) 
			keyswitch1{int} {keyswitch1}  := 0
			while(keyswitch1{int} {keyswitch1}  <= 24) 
				_legato_data_sus_fade_in_time[(result6{int} {result6}  * 204800) + ((transition0{int} {transition0}  * 25600) + ((layer0{int} {layer0}  * 6400) + ((note1{int} {note1}  * 3200) + ((subarticulation_idx1{int} {subarticulation_idx1}  * 25) + keyswitch1{int} {keyswitch1} ))))]{int} {_legato_data_sus_fade_in_time}  := _legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time[(note1{int} {note1}  * 3200) + ((subarticulation_idx1{int} {subarticulation_idx1}  * 25) + keyswitch1{int} {keyswitch1} )]{int} {_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time} 
				_legato_data_sus_release_time[(result6{int} {result6}  * 204800) + ((transition0{int} {transition0}  * 25600) + ((layer0{int} {layer0}  * 6400) + ((note1{int} {note1}  * 3200) + ((subarticulation_idx1{int} {subarticulation_idx1}  * 25) + keyswitch1{int} {keyswitch1} ))))]{int} {_legato_data_sus_release_time}  := _legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time[(note1{int} {note1}  * 3200) + ((subarticulation_idx1{int} {subarticulation_idx1}  * 25) + keyswitch1{int} {keyswitch1} )]{int} {_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time} 
				_legato_data_sus_wait_time[(result6{int} {result6}  * 204800) + ((transition0{int} {transition0}  * 25600) + ((layer0{int} {layer0}  * 6400) + ((note1{int} {note1}  * 3200) + ((subarticulation_idx1{int} {subarticulation_idx1}  * 25) + keyswitch1{int} {keyswitch1} ))))]{int} {_legato_data_sus_wait_time}  := _legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time[(note1{int} {note1}  * 3200) + ((subarticulation_idx1{int} {subarticulation_idx1}  * 25) + keyswitch1{int} {keyswitch1} )]{int} {_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time} 
				_legato_data_trans_fade_in_time[(result6{int} {result6}  * 204800) + ((transition0{int} {transition0}  * 25600) + ((layer0{int} {layer0}  * 6400) + ((note1{int} {note1}  * 3200) + ((subarticulation_idx1{int} {subarticulation_idx1}  * 25) + keyswitch1{int} {keyswitch1} ))))]{int} {_legato_data_trans_fade_in_time}  := _legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time[(note1{int} {note1}  * 3200) + ((subarticulation_idx1{int} {subarticulation_idx1}  * 25) + keyswitch1{int} {keyswitch1} )]{int} {_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time}

	end if
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(btn_subarticulation_title{int} {btn_subarticulation_title} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} , 0){Builtin, None, set_control_par}

function update_mixer_eq
	btn_mixer_eq_disable_input{int} {btn_mixer_eq_disable_input}  := btn_mixer_eq_title{int} {btn_mixer_eq_title} 
	interval1{int} {interval1}  := abs(sh_right(abs(btn_mixer_eq_title{int} {btn_mixer_eq_title} ){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}){Builtin, None, abs}

function toggle_con_sordino
	iii2{int} {iii2}  := 0
	while(iii2{int} {iii2}  <= 4) 
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS{int} {ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS} , abs(sh_right(abs(i10{int} {i10} ){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}){Builtin, None, abs}, -1, 0, iii2{int} {iii2}  + NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} {NI_BUS_OFFSET} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
		message("Con Sordino: " & i10{int} {i10}  & " for channel " & iii2{int} {iii2} ){Builtin, None, message}
		inc(iii2{int} {iii2} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
end function

function move_to_legato_buffer
	layer0{int} {layer0}  := 0
	transition0{int} {transition0}  := 0
	result6{int} {result6}  := 0
	note1{int} {note1}  := 0
	while(note1{int} {note1}  <= 1) 
		layer0{int} {layer0}  := 0
		while(layer0{int} {layer0}  <= 127) 
			transition0{int} {transition0}  := 0
			while(transition0{int} {transition0}  <= 24) 
				_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time[(note1{int} {note1}  * 3200) + ((layer0{int} {layer0}  * 25) + transition0{int} {transition0} )]{int} {_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time}  := _legato_data_sus_fade_in_time[(instrument1{int} {instrument1}  * 204800) + ((keyswitch1{int} {keyswitch1}  * 25600) + ((subarticulation_idx1{int} {subarticulation_idx1}  * 6400) + ((note1{int} {note1}  * 3200) + ((layer0{int} {layer0}  * 25) + transition0{int} {transition0} ))))]{int} {_legato_data_sus_fade_in_time} 
				_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time[(note1{int} {note1}  * 3200) + ((layer0{int} {layer0}  * 25) + transition0{int} {transition0} )]{int} {_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time}  := _legato_data_sus_release_time[(instrument1{int} {instrument1}  * 204800) + ((keyswitch1{int} {keyswitch1}  * 25600) + ((subarticulation_idx1{int} {subarticulation_idx1}  * 6400) + ((note1{int} {note1}  * 3200) + ((layer0{int} {layer0}  * 25) + transition0{int} {transition0} ))))]{int} {_legato_data_sus_release_time} 
				_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time[(note1{int} {note1}  * 3200) + ((layer0{int} {layer0}  * 25) + transition0{int} {transition0} )]{int} {_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time}  := _legato_data_sus_wait_time[(instrument1{int} {instrument1}  * 204800) + ((keyswitch1{int} {keyswitch1}  * 25600) + ((subarticulation_idx1{int} {subarticulation_idx1}  * 6400) + ((note1{int} {note1}  * 3200) + ((layer0{int} {layer0}  * 25) + transition0{int} {transition0} ))))]{int} {_legato_data_sus_wait_time} 
				_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time[(note1{int} {note1}  * 3200) + ((layer0{int} {layer0}  * 25) + transition0{int} {transition0} )]{int} {_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time}  := _legato_data_trans_fade_in_time[(instrument1{int} {instrument1}  * 204800) + ((keyswitch1{int} {keyswitch1}  * 25600) + ((subarticulation_idx1{int} {subarticulation_idx1}  * 6400) + ((note1{int} {note1}  * 3200) + ((layer0{int} {layer0}  * 25) + transition0{int} {transition0} ))))]{int} {_legato_data_trans_fade_in_time} 
				_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time[(note1{int} {note1}  * 3200) + ((layer0{int} {layer0}  * 25) + transition0{int} {transition0} )]{int} {_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time}  := _legato_data_trans_fade_out_time[(instrument1{int} {instrument1}  * 204800) + ((keyswitch1{int} {keyswitch1}  * 25600) + ((subarticulation_idx1{int} {subarticulation_idx1}  * 6400) + ((note1{int} {note1}  * 3200) + ((layer0{int} {layer0}  * 25) + transition0{int} {transition0} ))))]{int} {_legato_data_trans_fade_out_time} 
				_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start[(note1{int} {note1}  * 3200) + ((layer0{int} {layer0}  * 25) + transition0{int} {transition0} )]{int} {_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start}  := _legato_data_trans_zone_start[(instrument1{int} {instrument1}  * 204800) + ((keyswitch1{int} {keyswitch1}  * 25600) + ((subarticulation_idx1{int} {subarticulation_idx1}  * 6400) + ((note1{int} {note1}  * 3200) + ((layer0{int} {layer0}  * 25) + transition0{int} {transition0} ))))]{int} {_legato_data_trans_zone_start}

function find_loaded_legato
	authoring_page_active{int} {authoring_page_active}  := 0
	if(_loaded_subarticulations[0]{int} {_loaded_subarticulations}  # -1)
		if(subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[_loaded_subarticulations[0]{int} {_loaded_subarticulations} ]{int} {subarticulations_ids_positions} ]{int} {subarticulations_type}  = 2)
			authoring_page_active{int} {authoring_page_active}  := 1
			set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_authoring_legato_title{int} {lbl_authoring_legato_title} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_TEXT} , subarticulations_full_name[subarticulations_ids_positions[_loaded_subarticulations[0]{int} {_loaded_subarticulations} ]{int} {subarticulations_ids_positions} ]{string} {subarticulations_full_name}  & " (" & _loaded_subarticulations[0]{int} {_loaded_subarticulations}  & ")"){Builtin, None, set_control_par_str}
		end if
	end if
end function

function authoring_open
	call find_loaded_legato{UserDefined, Call, find_loaded_legato}
	ret21{int} {ret21}  := 60
	i280000{int} {i280000}  := 60
	instrument1{int} {instrument1}  := 0
	call update_authoring_transition{UserDefined, Call, update_authoring_transition}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(pnl_authoring{int} {pnl_authoring} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_HIDE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_HIDE} , HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int} {HIDE_PART_NOTHING} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	i28020{int} {i28020}  := 0
	while(i28020{int} {i28020}  <= 127) 
		tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[i28020{int} {i28020} ]{int} {tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve}  := _legato_data_all_transitions_volume_curve[i28020{int} {i28020} ]{int} {_legato_data_all_transitions_volume_curve} 
		inc(i28020{int} {i28020} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
end function

function center_circle_distance
	subarticulation_modulation_strength000{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength000}  := subarticulation_modulation_strength010{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength010}  - 0.5
	fade_level00{real} {fade_level00}  := _ret6000{real} {_ret6000}  - 0.5
	subarticulation_modulation_strength0{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength0}  := sqrt((subarticulation_modulation_strength000{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength000}  * subarticulation_modulation_strength000{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength000} ) + (fade_level00{real} {fade_level00}  * fade_level00{real} {fade_level00} )){Builtin, None, sqrt}
end function

function center_circle_angle
	subarticulation_modulation_strength010{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength010}  := subarticulation_modulation_strength000{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength000}  - 0.5
	subarticulation_modulation_strength0{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength0}  := _ret6000{real} {_ret6000}  - 0.5
	weight0{real} {weight0}  := subarticulation_modulation_strength010{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength010}  / sqrt((subarticulation_modulation_strength010{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength010}  * subarticulation_modulation_strength010{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength010} ) + (subarticulation_modulation_strength0{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength0}  * subarticulation_modulation_strength0{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength0} )){Builtin, None, sqrt}
	subarticulation_modulation_strength001{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength001}  := acos(weight0{real} {weight0} ){Builtin, None, acos}
	if(subarticulation_modulation_strength0{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength0}  < 0)
		subarticulation_modulation_strength001{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength001}  := (2 * NI_MATH_PI{real} {NI_MATH_PI} ) - subarticulation_modulation_strength001{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength001} 
	end if
	fade_level00{real} {fade_level00}  := subarticulation_modulation_strength001{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength001} 
end function

function angle_to_value
	subarticulation_modulation_strength010{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength010}  := subarticulation_modulation_strength001{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength001}  + (NI_MATH_PI{real} {NI_MATH_PI}  / 2)
	if(subarticulation_modulation_strength010{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength010}  > (NI_MATH_PI{real} {NI_MATH_PI}  * 2))
		subarticulation_modulation_strength010{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength010}  := subarticulation_modulation_strength010{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength010}  - (2 * NI_MATH_PI{real} {NI_MATH_PI} )
	end if
	subarticulation_modulation_strength010{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength010}  := abs(subarticulation_modulation_strength010{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength010}  - (2 * NI_MATH_PI{real} {NI_MATH_PI} )){Builtin, None, abs}
	iii1{int} {iii1}  := int((127 * (subarticulation_modulation_strength010{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength010}  - weight0{real} {weight0} )) / (subarticulation_modulation_strength0{real} {subarticulation_modulation_strength0}  - weight0{real} {weight0} )){Builtin, None, int}
end function

function get_currently_opened_ks_instrument_idx
	group_count000{int} {group_count000}  := 0
	while(group_count000{int} {group_count000}  = 0) 
		_ret9100{int} {_ret9100}  := 0
		while((_ret9100{int} {_ret9100}  <= (num_elements(subarticulation_id_start{int[]} {subarticulation_id_start} ){Builtin, None, num_elements} - 1)) and (group_count000{int} {group_count000}  = 0))

function dev_keys.get_preset_path

			i280000{int} {i280000}  := 1
			continue{Builtin, None, continue}
		end if
	end while
end function

function Scrollarea.is_idx_on_sight
	interval1{int} {interval1}  := 0
	while(interval1{int} {interval1}  = 0) 
		time1{int} {time1}  := scroll.up{int} {scroll.up} 
		countdown0{int} {countdown0}  := scroll.up{int} {scroll.up}  + 18
		if((velo0{int} {velo0}  >= time1{int} {time1} ) and (velo0{int} {velo0}  < countdown0{int} {countdown0} ))
			note9{int} {note9}  := 1
			interval1{int} {interval1}  := 1
			continue{Builtin, None, continue}
		else
			note9{int} {note9}  := 0
			interval1{int} {interval1}  := 1
			continue{Builtin, None, continue}
		end if
	end while
end function
